error_signature: Parse error at line: 1, column: 73: Incorrect syntax near ‘,’
title: Syntax error on multi-row insert in Azure Dedicated SQL pool
symptom: When attempting to insert multiple rows into an Azure Dedicated SQL pool, a syntax error occurs indicating an issue near a comma.
applies_when: Inserting multiple rows into Azure Dedicated SQL pool
root_cause: Azure Dedicated SQL Pools do not support the same multi-row INSERT syntax that is available in regular SQL Server databases. This leads to syntax errors when trying to execute such queries.
fix_steps: Change the insert query to use multiple single-row INSERT statements instead of a multi-row INSERT.
Test the modified query to ensure it executes without errors.
agent_instruction: Modify the insert operation to use single-row inserts for Azure Dedicated SQL pool.
